scripts.edgeone:build: npm run ci && npm run pages:prepare -- --channel edgeone-primary --output .edgeone-artifact
scripts.validate: node scripts/build-stage6b-compatible.mjs && node scripts/validate-compatible-active.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage5f.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage5g-compatible-active.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage6a.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage6a-acceptance.mjs && node scripts/validate-stage6b.mjs && npm run release:audit && npm run audit:repository
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm test && npm run validate && npm run audit:dependencies
